judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the required immediate rinse for at least 15 minutes with eyelids open and clear escalation after rinsing. Extra details about saline, eye movement, contacts, rubbing, neutralizing agents, and bringing SDS are not grounded in the source, but they do not contradict the core required actions. Escalation says immediate medical attention rather than the more specific eye specialist, so grounding is only partial.
